description: Master registry for the UCGIS 2026 workshop reference: two roles (builder + domain), each carrying its own 3-track KG (skills + knowledge + behaviors). The dashboard treats this file's roles[] as the structural backbone that connects role roots into a single weakly-connected graph.

roles.name: Builder (Platform / Meta)
roles.description: Knows what AgentLoom is and how to author skills / knowledge / behaviors. Stable; changes only when the framework itself evolves.

graphs.description: Meta-knowledge about AgentLoom (architecture, schemas, propose-protocol, governance, validator-authoring).
Builder-side skills: propose-node, validate-kg, wire-validator, emit-cline, emit-claude-code.
Builder-side behaviors: KG-integrity rules, each shipping a Tier-A Python validator.

roles.name: Domain (Geospatial Catalog App)
roles.description: Domain-specific knowledge for the WebGIS catalog over D1-D4 public data sources. Grows bottom-up via propose-review during Phase 2.

graphs.description: Geospatial / data-source knowledge accreted via propose-review.
Domain-side reusable skills (ingest, normalize, render, publish).
Domain-side behaviors (data quality, FAIR metadata, etc.).
